features.title: Repository intelligence artifacts v1
features.goal: Keep index/graph artifacts deterministic and schema-versioned for index-once/query-many workflows.

features.title: Query surface stabilization
features.goal: Stabilize query command outputs and deterministic failures for missing intelligence artifacts.

features.title: Plan/apply trust-model hardening
features.goal: Strengthen apply safety boundaries and keep remediation derivation deterministic.

features.title: Deterministic analyze-pr output contracts
features.goal: Pin analyze-pr output formats and normalize SCM context behavior across CI/local runs.

features.title: Canonical command ownership and plugin convergence
features.goal: Remove duplicated command implementations and align plugin loading across command surfaces.

features.title: Deterministic delivery system and CI gating
features.goal: Require roadmap IDs, roadmap contract validity, and docs/contract checks in branch validation.

features.title: Product truth packaging and narrative sync
features.goal: Package canonical Playbook workflow truth into deterministic metadata and audit surfaces so humans and AI agents can reliably discover what is canonical, live, compatibility-only, utility, planned, and question-bounded.

features.title: Failure intelligence loop and prevention codification
features.goal: Capture failures as structured intelligence and deterministically map them into rules, tests, docs, and remediation scaffolds.

features.title: Architecture intelligence graph v2
features.goal: Evolve repository graph artifacts into a semantic architecture graph that powers explain/query/analyze-pr impact and risk reasoning.

features.title: PR-based playbook-demo refresh automation
features.goal: Refresh committed playbook-demo artifacts/docs with branch-accurate local CLI builds through dedicated maintenance workflows and PR-based delivery.

features.title: Knowledge Compaction Phase deterministic foundations
features.goal: Formalize and implement internal-first deterministic compaction foundations (canonicalization, deterministic bucketing, and review explanation artifacts) without expanding broad end-user command surface.

features.title: Knowledge compaction candidate extraction
features.goal: Convert trusted deterministic repository evidence into canonicalized candidate patterns for future compaction, comparison, and review workflows.

features.title: Knowledge compaction deterministic bucketing
features.goal: Deterministically compare canonicalized candidate patterns and route them into discard / attach / merge / add outcomes before human review.

features.title: Pattern card storage and review drafts
features.goal: Persist graph-ready reusable pattern cards from deterministic compaction outcomes while keeping promotion human-reviewed.

features.title: Toroidal Flow architecture overlay and RunCycle contract
features.goal: Formalize Playbook as a deterministic closed-loop architecture overlay with shared RunCycle contracts while preserving current runtime behavior.

features.title: Final Architecture Map / Canonical Dependency Index
features.goal: Establish one canonical dependency-ordered architecture map and navigation index linking runtime foundations, trust boundaries, learning layers, and product/deployment overlays without redefining existing architecture semantics.

features.title: Platform observation layer evolution
features.goal: Extend the existing deterministic repo-intelligence and governance observation substrate into a broader platform observation layer without expanding the current 4-week delivery scope.

features.title: Knowledge persistence layer
features.goal: Define the post-observation persistence layer that retains deterministic evidence and knowledge artifacts with explicit lifecycle boundaries before broader platform scheduling.

features.title: Knowledge compaction and promotion layer
features.goal: Implement deterministic local pattern promotion pipeline with explicit review queue and decision-recorded approvals/rejections so compacted observations become durable knowledge only after governed promotion.

features.title: Architecture role inference and dependency-direction matrix validation
features.goal: Expose additive, observation-only architecture role inference (interface, orchestration, foundation, adapter) and dependency-direction matrix observations in repository intelligence artifacts without policy enforcement.

features.title: Session and evidence architecture layer
features.goal: Define first-class session envelope and evidence provenance contracts as prerequisites for policy orchestration, learning promotion, and broader AI runtime expansion.

features.title: Platform trust and evidence model
features.goal: Evolve current evidence-linked remediation and private-first trust boundaries into a broader platform trust model after persistence and longitudinal state foundations exist.

features.title: Control Plane / Agent Runtime v1 contract alignment
features.goal: Align roadmap contract metadata to implemented control-plane/session/agent/policy runtime surfaces without expanding mutation authority.

features.title: PR Review Loop architecture
features.goal: Define canonical PR review/orchestration workflow with deterministic analysis, evidence-linked findings, policy-gated bounded autofix eligibility, and mandatory re-verification.

features.title: Repo Longitudinal State + Knowledge Promotion architecture
features.goal: Define governed repo-local longitudinal state and human-reviewed knowledge-promotion contracts (candidate extraction, clustering, provenance-preserving promotion/demotion/supersession) after Session + Evidence, Control Plane, and PR Review Loop.

features.title: Knowledge Query / Inspection Surfaces for Memory
features.goal: Define deterministic, read-only, provenance-preserving inspection surfaces for repo-local memory and promoted knowledge before broader automation consumption.

features.title: Execution orchestration hardening
features.goal: Extend the current verify/plan/apply runtime into broader policy-gated orchestration only after control-plane foundations exist, without broadening the current 4-week implementation scope.

features.title: Governed cross-repo pattern promotion and transfer
features.goal: Promote proven, governed patterns across repositories only after local promotion and outcome evidence validate transfer readiness.

features.title: Governed interface/API surfaces for multi-repo control planes
features.goal: Define optional, policy-aware server/API interface surfaces that coordinate many Playbook-enabled repositories over one deterministic runtime without collapsing per-repo boundaries.

features.title: Workspace / tenant governance + optional hosted deployment model
features.goal: Define explicit workspace/tenant policy boundaries and optional hosted/self-hosted control-plane packaging over one deterministic runtime without weakening CLI-first, offline-capable, private-first guarantees.

features.title: Packaging / SKU architecture (Open Core -> Team -> Enterprise)
features.goal: Define a canonical SKU architecture where Open Core, Team, and Enterprise package coordination/governance/deployment surfaces over one deterministic runtime without introducing cloud-required or SKU-specific engine semantics.

features.title: Metrics / ROI / Proof-of-Value Architecture
features.goal: Define canonical value measurement architecture grounded in deterministic repository outcomes, trust, governance impact, and evidence-linked attribution across Open Core, Team, and Enterprise without cloud-required instrumentation.

features.title: Pilot / Design-Partner / Rollout Architecture
features.goal: Define canonical staged adoption from local read-only proof through team/workspace and enterprise governance readiness so rollout is evidence-driven, trust-gated, and aligned to deterministic runtime/control-plane maturity.

features.title: Platform interface surfaces
features.goal: Sequence broader interface surfaces over the deterministic runtime after multi-repo transfer and core control layers are defined, without treating those surfaces as present commitments.

features.title: Capability and model routing
features.goal: Define explicit capability-routing and any future bounded model-routing policy only after interface surfaces are grounded on the deterministic platform runtime.

features.title: Automation synthesis governed knowledge-consumption contract shell (Phase 15 thin slice)
features.goal: Define the Phase 15 architecture/contract shell for governed automation synthesis: Phase 15 consumes promoted, inspectable, provenance-linked knowledge only, remains suggestion-generation only, and attaches policy/provenance/rollback accountability hooks without autonomous mutation/deployment behavior.

features.title: Outcome feedback and automation runtime learning
features.goal: Implement outcome-linked learning loops that convert runtime results into governed evidence for pattern quality and safe promotion decisions.

features.title: Repository Memory System foundation
features.goal: Establish first-class repository memory architecture and contracts that separate structural intelligence from episodic memory and doctrine promotion boundaries without changing current runtime behavior.

features.title: Repository memory replay and consolidation
features.goal: Define deterministic replay/consolidation artifacts that derive candidate knowledge from episodic memory for human review before doctrine promotion.

features.title: Memory-aware retrieval composition
features.goal: Compose structural graph/index intelligence with episodic memory indexes and governed doctrine artifacts for deterministic memory-aware retrieval.

features.title: Repository memory promotion and prune workflow
features.goal: Define deterministic promotion/demotion/prune workflow so durable doctrine remains compact, reviewable, and provenance-linked.

features.title: Architecture-closure roadmap bootstrap for memory/control-plane wave
features.goal: Define architecture-closure sequencing and stable feature IDs so memory and control-plane execution can proceed in parallel without roadmap conflicts.

features.title: Repository Memory System v1 runtime contract alignment
features.goal: Align roadmap contract metadata to the implemented repository memory runtime surfaces and canonical read-only memory-system contract.

features.title: Replay / consolidation / promotion runtime contract alignment
features.goal: Align roadmap contract metadata to the implemented replay/consolidation/compaction/promotion read-only lifecycle contract surfaces.

features.title: Graph-memory composition bootstrap
features.goal: Define graph-memory composition between architecture intelligence and memory workflows for deterministic retrieval and explainability.

features.title: Outcome learning / policy-improvement v1 contract alignment
features.goal: Align roadmap contract metadata to implemented outcome-feedback, learning-state, higher-order synthesis, and policy-improvement candidate runtime surfaces.

features.title: External consumer managed-vs-local upgrade boundary hardening
features.goal: Define managed-vs-local repository boundaries for external consumer repos so future upgrade flows can evolve Playbook-owned surfaces without overwriting repo-local product intent.

features.title: Same-app backend cutover and provider migration doctrine
features.goal: Track same-app backend/provider cutovers as a reusable migration class with explicit auth-provider/user-id continuity, legacy bridge strategy, clean preview proof, parity signoff, grace-window retention, env inventory, source-of-truth versus derived table classification, and auth reset/recovery verification so the migration is not confused with a new-app migration.

features.title: Convergence source inventory contract
features.goal: Create a deterministic, review-only source inventory contract for deciding which Atlas and owner-repo Playbook-relevant surfaces should migrate, template, remain referenced, or become future adapters.

features.title: Research artifact contract foundation
features.goal: Create a deterministic, commandless artifact family for external-research outputs so project profiles, pattern sets, integration maps, and roadmap diffs can be reviewed and reused across repos.

features.title: Repo scorecard engine and report contract
features.goal: Turn Wave One repo standards into deterministic scorecard checks and stable report artifacts without introducing a portal clone or new command surface first.

features.title: Repo scorecard engine and stable report builder
features.goal: Build a pure internal scorecard report builder from explicit input evidence and the published scorecard contract without adding a CLI command, query surface, dashboard, or runtime writes.

features.title: Golden-path template registry
features.goal: Publish checked-in template descriptors for common repo and feature archetypes so downstream adoption can reuse governed defaults instead of copy-pasted setup guidance.

features.title: Workflow-pack environment bridge contract
features.goal: Define a deterministic, commandless bridge contract for mapping reusable Playbook workflow packs to environment-gated verification, approval, publish, and deployment boundaries without introducing hidden workflow behavior.

features.title: Workflow-pack environment bridge engine and stable report builder
features.goal: Build a deterministic, commandless report builder from explicit workflow-pack environment bridge input so environment gates, receipt posture, secret-ref safety, and downstream inheritance rules remain inspectable Playbook truth before any planner or workflow implementation exists.

features.title: Workflow-pack environment bridge planner artifact
features.goal: Turn the stable workflow-pack environment bridge report into a deterministic, commandless implementation plan artifact so downstream consumer repos can review next actions before any workflow or execution surface exists.

features.title: Workflow-pack environment bridge executor contract foundation
features.goal: Define the commandless executor and executor-receipt contracts for workflow-pack environment bridges so future dry-run and apply layers must obey explicit mutation, approval, secret-ref, and receipt-ref boundaries before any implementation surface exists.

features.title: Workflow-pack environment bridge dry-run executor
features.goal: Implement a commandless, pure dry-run executor that evaluates explicit workflow-pack environment bridge executor contracts and returns deterministic in-memory executor receipts without mutating infrastructure, writing runtime artifacts, or implying runtime availability.

features.title: Windows root-script test spawn/path hardening
features.goal: Normalize root-script test spawn and path behavior on Windows so the full pnpm test suite can return to green without changing convergence source-inventory contracts.

features.title: Windows engine test baseline hardening
features.goal: Restore the engine package test baseline on Windows and full-suite execution by fixing path normalization, Windows-invalid fixture filenames, standalone timeout behavior, and package-level order/performance pressure without changing convergence contracts, research review docs, or root-script helper behavior unless a proven interaction is found.

features.title: Windows CLI test baseline hardening
features.goal: Restore the CLI workspace test baseline on Windows by fixing path-contract mismatches and any remaining IPC lifecycle failures after concrete assertion failures are resolved, without changing convergence contracts, research review docs, root-script helper behavior, or engine baseline behavior.

features.title: Engine package load timeout hardening
features.goal: Restore engine package stability under full workspace and package-load execution by fixing timeout pressure, fixture isolation, and heavy git or temp test behavior without changing workflow-pack bridge contracts, research contracts, scorecard contracts, golden-path registry contracts, or command surfaces unless a direct interaction is proven.

contractPolicy.architectureSlices: Implementation-facing architecture slices are represented as explicit feature entries when they define dependency-relevant build sequencing.
contractPolicy.productOverlays: Product/business overlays may be grouped as roadmap feature families and must not be treated as runtime prerequisites.
contractPolicy.statusSemantics: Architecture-defined does not imply implementation-committed or implemented status; statuses must reflect implementation truth.
contractPolicy.alignmentRule: ROADMAP.json must stay aligned with docs/PLAYBOOK_PRODUCT_ROADMAP.md and the final architecture dependency map.
contractPolicy.implementationSequencingRule: Build order follows trust and dependency order: baseline -> hardening -> next buildable slices -> later platform layers -> product/business overlays.
contractPolicy.researchExitFailureMode: Leaving research mode without execution shape causes architecture/contract drift and dependency-order violations.
